sentences.sentence: By tradition land in Luapula is not owned by individuals, but as in many other parts of Africa is allocated by the headman or headwoman of a village to people of either sex, according to need.
sentences.translation: 按照传统，卢阿普拉的土地并非归个人所有，而是像非洲其他许多地区一样，由村里的男首领或女首领根据需要分配给男女村民。

structure.text: as in many other parts of Africa
is allocated by the headman or headwoman of a village to people of either sex, according to need

difficult_points: land in Luapula 是主语，由 but 连接的两个谓语 is not owned 和 is allocated 共享。
as in many other parts of Africa 是插入的比较状语，表示“像非洲其他许多地区一样”。
by the headman or headwoman... 和 to people of either sex 分别说明分配的施动者和对象。

sentences.sentence: Since land is generally prepared by hand, one ulupwa cannot take on a very large area; in this sense land has not been a limiting resource over large parts of the province.
sentences.translation: 由于土地通常靠人力耕整，一户人家（ulupwa）无法承担很大面积的土地；从这个意义上说，在该省大部分地区，土地并不是一种限制性资源。

structure.text: Since land is generally prepared by hand
one ulupwa cannot take on a very large area
in this sense land has not been a limiting resource over large parts of the province

difficult_points: Since 引导原因状语从句，说明土地面积受限的原因。
ulupwa 是当地语言词汇，指一个家庭生产单位。
in this sense 承接前文，引出对土地资源状况的总结性判断。

sentences.sentence: The situation has already changed near the main townships, and there has long been a scarcity of land for cultivation in the Valley.
sentences.translation: 在主要城镇附近，这种情况已经发生了变化，而河谷地区长期以来一直存在耕地稀缺的问题。

structure.text: has already changed near the main townships
and there has long been a scarcity of land for cultivation in the Valley

difficult_points: has already changed 是现在完成时，强调这一变化持续至今。
there has long been 是存在句的完成时形式，强调稀缺状况长期存在。

sentences.sentence: In these areas registered ownership patterns are becoming prevalent.
sentences.translation: 在这些地区，登记所有权的模式正变得越来越普遍。
difficult_points: registered ownership patterns 指经过正式登记的土地所有权制度，与前文传统分配方式形成对比。
are becoming prevalent 是现在进行时，强调这一趋势正在发生。

sentences.sentence: Most of the traditional cropping in Luapula, as in the Bemba area to the east, is based on citemene, a system whereby crops are grown on the ashes of tree branches.
sentences.translation: 卢阿普拉大部分传统耕作方式，与东边的本巴地区一样，都以“西特梅内”耕作制为基础，即在树枝烧成的灰烬上种植作物的一种制度。

structure.text: Most of the traditional cropping in Luapula
as in the Bemba area to the east
a system whereby crops are grown on the ashes of tree branches
whereby crops are grown on the ashes of tree branches

difficult_points: as in the Bemba area to the east 是插入的比较状语，表示“与本巴地区一样”。
a system whereby... 是对 citemene 的同位语说明，whereby 相当于 by which，引导定语从句。

sentences.sentence: As a rule, entire trees are not felled, but are pollarded so that they can regenerate.
sentences.translation: 通常，人们不会把整棵树砍倒，而是采取截顶的方式，以便树木能够再生。
difficult_points: are not felled, but are pollarded 是并列谓语，用被动语态对比“砍倒”与“截顶”两种做法。
so that 引导目的状语从句，说明截顶的目的是让树木再生。

sentences.sentence: Branches are cut over an area of varying size early in the dry season, and stacked to dry over a rough circle about a fifth to a tenth of the pollarded area.
sentences.translation: 在旱季初期，人们在面积不等的一片区域内砍下树枝，并将其堆放在一个大致圆形的区域内晾干，这个区域的面积约为截顶区域的五分之一到十分之一。

structure.text: are cut over an area of varying size early in the dry season
and stacked to dry over a rough circle about a fifth to a tenth of the pollarded area

difficult_points: are cut ... and stacked ... 是并列的被动谓语，共用主语 Branches。
to dry 是不定式作目的状语，说明堆放树枝的目的。
about a fifth to a tenth of the pollarded area 说明堆放区域相对于截顶区域的比例。

sentences.sentence: The wood is fired before the rains and in the first year planted with the African cereal finger millet (Eleusine coracana).
sentences.translation: 木材在雨季来临之前被点燃焚烧，第一年则种上非洲谷物龙爪稷（Eleusine coracana）。

structure.text: and in the first year planted with the African cereal finger millet (Eleusine coracana)

difficult_points: is fired 和 planted 是并列的被动谓语，共用主语 The wood 和助动词 is。
finger millet (Eleusine coracana) 是对这种非洲谷物的学名补充说明。

sentences.sentence: During the second season, and possibly for a few seasons more the area is planted to variously mixed combinations of annuals such as maize, pumpkins (Telfiria occidentalis) and other cucurbits, sweet potatoes, groundnuts, Phaseolus beans and various leafy vegetables, grown with a certain amount of rotation.
sentences.translation: 在第二季，甚至可能延续到之后的几季，这片土地会种上各种混合搭配的一年生作物，比如玉米、南瓜（Telfiria occidentalis）及其他葫芦科植物、甘薯、花生、菜豆和各种叶菜，并采用一定程度的轮作。

structure.text: and possibly for a few seasons more
is planted to variously mixed combinations of annuals
such as maize, pumpkins (Telfiria occidentalis) and other cucurbits, sweet potatoes, groundnuts, Phaseolus beans and various leafy vegetables
grown with a certain amount of rotation

difficult_points: such as... 列举 annuals 一年生作物的具体种类。
grown with a certain amount of rotation 是过去分词短语，修饰 combinations of annuals，说明种植方式采用一定的轮作。

sentences.sentence: The diverse sequence ends with vegetable cassava, which is often planted into the developing last-but-one crop as a relay.
sentences.translation: 这种多样化的种植序列以蔬菜木薯收尾，木薯常常在倒数第二茬作物尚未成熟时就以接茬的方式种下。

structure.text: which is often planted into the developing last-but-one crop as a relay

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 vegetable cassava，补充说明木薯的种植方式。
the developing last-but-one crop 指“正在生长中的倒数第二茬作物”，last-but-one 表示“倒数第二个”。
as a relay 表示“以接茬轮作的方式”，说明木薯是套种在前一茬作物中的。

sentences.sentence: Richards (1969) observed that the practice of citemene entails a definite division of labour between men and women.
sentences.translation: 理查兹（Richards，1969）观察到，西特梅内耕作方式包含着男女之间明确的分工。

structure.text: that the practice of citemene entails a definite division of labour between men and women

difficult_points: Richards (1969) 是文献引用形式，表示作者及发表年份。
entail 意为“需要、包含”，宾语是 a definite division of labour。

sentences.sentence: A man stakes out a plot in an unobtrusive manner, since it is considered provocative towards one's neighbours to mark boundaries in an explicit way.
sentences.translation: 男子会以不张扬的方式圈定一块地，因为明确地标出边界会被视为对邻居的一种冒犯。

structure.text: stakes out a plot in an unobtrusive manner
since it is considered provocative towards one's neighbours to mark boundaries in an explicit way
is considered provocative towards one's neighbours
to mark boundaries in an explicit way

difficult_points: since 引导原因状语从句，说明男子低调圈地的原因。
it 是形式主语，真正的主语是后面的 to mark boundaries in an explicit way。
is considered provocative 是被动语态，表示“被认为是挑衅性的”。

sentences.sentence: The dangerous work of felling branches is the men's province, and involves much pride.
sentences.translation: 砍伐树枝这项危险的工作属于男子的职责范围，也是一件让他们颇感自豪的事。

structure.text: The dangerous work of felling branches

difficult_points: of felling branches 是介词短语修饰 work，说明具体是哪种工作。
the men's province 中 province 意为“职责范围、领域”，而非“省份”。

sentences.sentence: Branches are stacke by the women, and fired by the men.
sentences.translation: 树枝由女子堆放，再由男子点火焚烧。
difficult_points: stacke 为 stacked 的原文笔误，意为“被堆放”。
are stacke by... 和 fired by... 是并列的被动谓语，分别说明堆放和点火分别由女子和男子完成。

sentences.sentence: Formerly women and men cooperated in the planting work, but the harvesting was always done by the women.
sentences.translation: 过去，种植工作由男女共同完成，但收获工作则一直由女子负责。

structure.text: Formerly women and men cooperated in the planting work
but the harvesting was always done by the women

difficult_points: Formerly 表示“过去、以前”，暗示与现状形成对比。
was always done by 是被动语态，强调收获工作一直由女子承担。

sentences.sentence: At the beginning of the cycle little weeding is necessary, since the firing of the branches effectively destroys weeds.
sentences.translation: 在这一循环的开始阶段几乎不需要除草，因为焚烧树枝能有效清除杂草。

structure.text: At the beginning of the cycle
since the firing of the branches effectively destroys weeds

difficult_points: little weeding 表示“几乎不需要除草”，little 修饰不可数名词 weeding 表否定含义。
since 引导原因状语从句，解释开始阶段不需要除草的原因。

sentences.sentence: As the cycle progresses weeds increase and nutrients eventually become depleted to a point where further effort with annual crops is judged to be not worthwhile: at this point the cassava is planted, since it can produce a crop on nearly exhausted soil.
sentences.translation: 随着这一循环的推进，杂草逐渐增多，土壤养分最终消耗到这样一种程度：继续种植一年生作物被认为已不再划算；此时便种下木薯，因为它能在几近贫瘠的土壤上产出作物。

structure.text: and nutrients eventually become depleted to a point
where further effort with annual crops is judged to be not worthwhile
at this point the cassava is planted
since it can produce a crop on nearly exhausted soil

difficult_points: As 引导时间状语从句，表示“随着……”。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 a point，说明养分耗尽到何种程度。
is judged to be not worthwhile 是被动语态，表示“被认为不再划算”。
since 引导原因状语从句，解释此时种植木薯的原因。

sentences.sentence: Thereafter the plot is abandoned, and a new area pollarded for the next citemene cycle.
sentences.translation: 此后这块地便被弃耕，另找一片新区域截顶，用于下一轮西特梅内耕作循环。

structure.text: and a new area pollarded for the next citemene cycle

difficult_points: Thereafter 表示“此后”，承接前文木薯种植的阶段。
a new area pollarded... 省略了 is，与 is abandoned 并列，完整为 a new area is pollarded。

sentences.sentence: When forest is not available – this is increasingly the case nowadays – various ridging systems (ibala) are built on small areas, to be planted with combinations of maize, beans, groundnuts and sweet potatoes, usually relayed with cassava.
sentences.translation: 当没有森林可用时——如今这种情况越来越常见——人们会在小块土地上修建各种垄作系统（伊巴拉），用来种植玉米、豆类、花生和甘薯的组合作物，通常还会接茬种上木薯。

structure.text: this is increasingly the case nowadays
to be planted with combinations of maize, beans, groundnuts and sweet potatoes

difficult_points: When 引导时间状语从句，破折号之间的内容是插入语，补充说明这种情况如今很常见。
to be planted with... 是不定式的被动式，作目的状语，说明修建垄作系统的用途。
usually relayed with cassava 是过去分词短语，补充说明这些作物后期常接茬种上木薯。

sentences.sentence: These plots are usually tended by women, and provide subsistence.
sentences.translation: 这些地块通常由女子照料，并提供维持生计所需的食物。
difficult_points: are tended by 是被动语态，强调地块“被照料”的对象是女子。
provide subsistence 表示为家庭提供基本生活所需。

sentences.sentence: Where their roots have year-round access to water tables mango, guava and oil-palm trees often grow around houses, forming a traditional agroforestry system.
sentences.translation: 在根系能全年获取地下水的地方，芒果树、番石榴树和油棕树常常生长在房屋周围，形成一种传统的农林复合系统。

structure.text: Where their roots have year-round access to water tables

difficult_points: Where 引导地点状语从句，说明这些树木生长的条件所在地。
year-round access to water tables 表示“全年可以获取地下水位”。
forming a traditional agroforestry system 是现在分词短语作伴随状语，说明生长的结果。

sentences.sentence: In season some of the fruit is sold by the roadside or in local markets.
sentences.translation: 在应季时节，一部分果实会在路边或当地市场上出售。

structure.text: is sold by the roadside or in local markets

difficult_points: In season 表示“在应季/当季时”。
is sold by the roadside or in local markets 是被动语态，列举了两种销售场所。

sentences.sentence: The margins of dambos are sometimes planted to local varieties of rice during the rainy season, and areas adjacent to vegetables irrigated with water from the dambo during the dry season.
sentences.translation: 在雨季，达姆博湿地的边缘地带有时会种上本地稻米品种；在旱季，则会用湿地里的水灌溉与之相邻的蔬菜种植区。

structure.text: are sometimes planted to local varieties of rice during the rainy season
and areas adjacent to vegetables irrigated with water from the dambo during the dry season
irrigated with water from the dambo

difficult_points: and 后的并列部分省略了谓语，完整应为 areas adjacent to vegetables are irrigated with...。
irrigated with water from the dambo 是过去分词短语，修饰 areas adjacent to vegetables，说明其灌溉方式。
dambos 是当地语言词汇，指季节性湿地。

sentences.sentence: The extent of cultivation is very limited, no doubt because the growing of crops under dambo conditions calls for a great deal of skill.
sentences.translation: 耕种的规模非常有限，这无疑是因为在湿地条件下种植作物需要相当高的技能。

structure.text: no doubt because the growing of crops under dambo conditions calls for a great deal of skill

difficult_points: no doubt 插在句中，表示说话人对原因的肯定判断，相当于“无疑是因为”。
calls for 意为“需要、要求”，宾语是 a great deal of skill。

sentences.sentence: Near towns some of the vegetable produce is sold in local markets.
sentences.translation: 在城镇附近，一部分蔬菜产品会在当地市场上出售。
difficult_points: produce 在此作不可数名词，意为“农产品”，而不是动词“生产”。
Near towns 提前至句首，说明蔬菜出售的地理条件。

sentences.sentence: Fishing has long provided a much needed protein supplement to the diet of Luapulans, as well as being the one substantial source of cash.
sentences.translation: 长期以来，捕鱼一直为卢阿普拉人的饮食提供了亟需的蛋白质补充，同时也是唯一可观的现金来源。

structure.text: has long provided a much needed protein supplement to the diet of Luapulans
as well as being the one substantial source of cash

difficult_points: has long provided 是现在完成时，强调捕鱼提供蛋白质补充这一作用长期持续。
as well as being... 是并列结构，补充说明捕鱼的另一重要作用——现金来源。

sentences.sentence: Much fish is dried for sale to areas away from the main waterways.
sentences.translation: 大量鱼被晒干后运往远离主要水道的地区出售。

structure.text: to areas away from the main waterways

difficult_points: is dried for sale 是被动语态，说明晒干鱼的目的是为了出售。
away from the main waterways 修饰 areas，说明这些地区远离主要水道。

sentences.sentence: The Mweru and Bangweulu Lake Basins are the main areas of year-round fishing, but the Luapula River is also exploited during the latter part of the dry season.
sentences.translation: 姆韦鲁湖和班韦乌卢湖流域是全年捕鱼的主要区域，但卢阿普拉河在旱季后期也会被用来捕鱼。

structure.text: The Mweru and Bangweulu Lake Basins
are the main areas of year-round fishing
but the Luapula River is also exploited during the latter part of the dry season

difficult_points: year-round fishing 表示“全年捕鱼”。
is also exploited 是被动语态，exploit 在此意为“开发利用”，而非贬义的“剥削”。

sentences.sentence: Several previously abundant and desirable species, such as the Luapula salmon or mpumbu (Labeo altivelis) and pale (Sarotherodon machochir) have all but disappeared from Lake Mweru, apparently due to mismanagement.
sentences.translation: 包括卢阿普拉鲑鱼（即mpumbu，学名Labeo altivelis）和pale（学名Sarotherodon machochir）在内的几种此前数量丰富、颇受欢迎的鱼类，如今几乎已从姆韦鲁湖消失，显然是管理不善所致。

structure.text: Several previously abundant and desirable species
such as the Luapula salmon or mpumbu (Labeo altivelis) and pale (Sarotherodon machochir)
have all but disappeared from Lake Mweru

difficult_points: such as... 列举两种具体的鱼类物种，并附上其当地名称和拉丁学名。
all but 表示“几乎、差不多”，all but disappeared 意为“几乎消失了”。
apparently due to mismanagement 说明物种消失的推测原因。

sentences.sentence: Fishing has always been a far more remunerative activity in Luapula that crop husbandry.
sentences.translation: 在卢阿普拉，捕鱼一直是一项比种植业收益丰厚得多的活动。

structure.text: has always been a far more remunerative activity in Luapula

difficult_points: far more remunerative 中 far 加强比较级，表示“……得多”。
that 为原文 than 的笔误，此处构成比较结构 more...than。

sentences.sentence: A fisherman may earn more in a week than a bean or maize grower in a whole season.
sentences.translation: 一个渔民一周挣的钱，可能比一个豆类或玉米种植者一整季挣的还多。

structure.text: may earn more in a week
than a bean or maize grower in a whole season

difficult_points: than 后省略了 earns，完整应为 than a bean or maize grower earns in a whole season。
in a week 与 in a whole season 形成对比，突出捕鱼收益之高。

sentences.sentence: I sometimes heard claims that the relatively high earnings to be obtained from fishing induced an 'easy come, easy go' outlook among Luapulan men.
sentences.translation: 我有时会听到这样的说法：捕鱼所能获得的相对较高的收入，使卢阿普拉的男性形成了一种“来得容易去得快”的消费观念。

structure.text: that the relatively high earnings to be obtained from fishing induced an 'easy come, easy go' outlook among Luapulan men

difficult_points: that 引导同位语从句，说明 claims 具体的内容。
to be obtained from fishing 是不定式的被动式，修饰 earnings，说明这些收入是靠捕鱼获得的。
'easy come, easy go' 是习语，形容钱来得容易也花得快。

sentences.sentence: On the other hand, someone who secures good but erratic earnings may feel that their investment in an economically productive activity is not worthwhile because Luapulans fail to cooperate well in such activities.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，收入虽高却不稳定的人，可能会觉得把钱投入某项经济生产活动并不划算，因为卢阿普拉人在这类合作性活动中配合得并不好。

structure.text: who secures good but erratic earnings
that their investment in an economically productive activity is not worthwhile
because Luapulans fail to cooperate well in such activities

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句，修饰 someone，good but erratic 说明收入虽好但不稳定。
that 引导宾语从句，作 feel 的宾语。
because 引导原因状语从句，解释为何这类投资被认为不划算。

sentences.sentence: Besides, a fisherman with spare cash will find little in the way of working equipment to spend his money on.
sentences.translation: 此外，手头有闲钱的渔民，也很难找到值得花钱购置的生产工具。

structure.text: will find little in the way of working equipment

difficult_points: in the way of 表示“……方面的”，修饰 little，即“在生产工具方面几乎找不到”。
to spend his money on 是不定式作后置定语，修饰 working equipment，介词 on 与句首的 little 呼应，指“可以把钱花在……上”。

sentences.sentence: Better spend one's money in the bars and have a good time!
sentences.translation: 还不如把钱花在酒吧里，好好享受一番！

structure.text: Better spend one's money in the bars

difficult_points: Better spend... 是省略了 It would be better to 的口语化祈使表达，带有讽刺或调侃语气。
have a good time 意为“玩得开心、好好享受”。

sentences.sentence: Only small numbers of cattle or oxen are kept in the province owing to the prevalence of the tse-tse fly.
sentences.translation: 由于采采蝇十分猖獗，该省饲养的牛或牛只数量很少。

structure.text: Only small numbers of cattle or oxen
owing to the prevalence of the tse-tse fly

difficult_points: owing to 表示“由于”，引出牛只数量稀少的原因。
the prevalence of the tse-tse fly 指采采蝇的广泛存在，这种蝇会传播危害牲畜的疾病。

sentences.sentence: For the few herds, the dambos provide subsistence grazing during the dry season.
sentences.translation: 对于为数不多的畜群而言，达姆博湿地在旱季提供了维持生计所需的放牧场地。

structure.text: provide subsistence grazing during the dry season

difficult_points: subsistence grazing 指仅够维持基本生计的放牧活动。
For the few herds 提前至句首，限定这一放牧场地的适用对象。

sentences.sentence: The absence of animal draft power greatly limits peoples' ability to plough and cultivate land: a married couple can rarely manage to prepare by hand-hoeing.
sentences.translation: 缺乏役畜动力大大限制了人们耕犁和耕种土地的能力：一对夫妇很少能靠手工锄地把土地整理出来。

structure.text: The absence of animal draft power
greatly limits peoples' ability to plough and cultivate land
a married couple can rarely manage to prepare by hand-hoeing

difficult_points: The absence of 表示“……的缺乏”，指没有役畜提供耕作动力。
to plough and cultivate land 是不定式修饰 ability，说明具体是哪方面的能力。
can rarely manage to do 表示“很少能够做到”。

sentences.sentence: Most people keep freely roaming chickens and goats.
sentences.translation: 大多数人饲养自由放养的鸡和山羊。

structure.text: keep freely roaming chickens and goats

difficult_points: freely roaming 是现在分词短语，修饰 chickens and goats，说明它们四处自由活动、不受圈养。
Most people 与前文只有少数人养牛形成对比，说明鸡和山羊的饲养更为普遍。

sentences.sentence: These act as a reserve for bartering, but may also be occasionally slaughtered for ceremonies or for entertaining important visitors.
sentences.translation: 这些牲畜相当于用来以物易物的储备，但有时也会被宰杀，用于仪式或招待重要客人。

structure.text: act as a reserve for bartering
but may also be occasionally slaughtered for ceremonies or for entertaining important visitors

difficult_points: act as 表示“充当、起……作用”。
may also be occasionally slaughtered 是被动语态，与前面的主动谓语 act 并列。

sentences.sentence: These animals are not a regular part of most peoples' diet.
sentences.translation: 这些牲畜并不是大多数人日常饮食中经常出现的部分。

structure.text: are not a regular part of most peoples' diet

difficult_points: a regular part of 表示“……中经常性的一部分”，此处用否定式说明这些牲畜很少被日常食用。
These animals 承接前一句，指代鸡和山羊。

sentences.sentence: Citemene has been an ingenious system for providing people with seasonal production of high quality cereals and vegetables in regions of acid, heavily leached soils.
sentences.translation: 西特梅内一直是一种巧妙的耕作制度，能在酸性、严重淋溶的土壤地区为人们提供季节性的优质谷物和蔬菜产出。

structure.text: for providing people with seasonal production of high quality cereals and vegetables
in regions of acid, heavily leached soils

difficult_points: has been 是现在完成时，强调这一制度长期以来一直发挥作用。
for providing people with... 说明这一制度的功能。
heavily leached soils 指养分被严重淋溶流失的土壤，是这一地区土壤贫瘠的原因。

sentences.sentence: Nutritionally, the most serious deficiency was that of protein.
sentences.translation: 从营养角度看，最严重的缺乏是蛋白质的缺乏。
difficult_points: Nutritionally 是副词作状语，限定“最严重的缺乏”是从营养角度而言。
that of protein 中 that 指代前面的 deficiency，即“蛋白质的缺乏”。

sentences.sentence: This could at times be alleviated when fish was available, provided that cultivators lived near the Valley and could find the means of bartering for dried fish.
sentences.translation: 在有鱼可得、并且耕作者住在靠近河谷的地方、能够找到以物易物换取干鱼的途径时，这种缺乏有时能够得到缓解。

structure.text: provided that cultivators lived near the Valley and could find the means of bartering for dried fish

difficult_points: This 指代上一句提到的蛋白质缺乏问题。
when 引导时间状语从句，说明缓解的前提条件之一。
provided that 意为“只要、如果”，引导另一条件状语从句，与 when 从句并列限定缓解的条件。

sentences.sentence: The citemene/fishing system was well adapted to the ecology of the miombo regions and sustainable for long periods, but only as long as human population densities stayed at low levels.
sentences.translation: 西特梅内与捕鱼相结合的体系，很好地适应了miombo林地地区的生态环境，并能长期维持下去，但前提是人口密度始终保持在较低水平。

structure.text: was well adapted to the ecology of the miombo regions
but only as long as human population densities stayed at low levels

difficult_points: be adapted to 表示“适应于……”。
but only as long as 表示“但前提仅仅是……”，限定前面可持续这一结论成立的条件。

sentences.sentence: Although population densities are still much lower than in several countries of South-East Asia, neither the fisheries nor the forests and woodlands of Luapula are capable, with unmodified traditional practices, of supporting the people in a sustainable manner.
sentences.translation: 尽管人口密度仍远低于东南亚一些国家，但若沿用未加改良的传统方式，卢阿普拉的渔业以及森林和林地都无法以可持续的方式养活当地人口。

structure.text: Although population densities are still much lower than in several countries of South-East Asia
neither the fisheries nor the forests and woodlands of Luapula
of supporting the people in a sustainable manner

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，与主句形成转折。
neither ... nor ... 连接并列主语，谓语用复数 are。
with unmodified traditional practices 是插入的条件状语，限定后面结论成立的前提。

sentences.sentence: Overall, people must learn to intensify and diversify their productive systems while yet ensuring that these systems will remain productive in the future, when even more people will need food.
sentences.translation: 总的来说，人们必须学会强化并多样化自身的生产体系，同时还要确保这些体系在未来——那时将有更多人需要食物——依然能保持高产。

structure.text: must learn to intensify and diversify their productive systems
while yet ensuring that these systems will remain productive in the future
that these systems will remain productive in the future
when even more people will need food

difficult_points: learn to do 与 while ensuring 并列，说明人们既要学会强化多样化生产，又要确保未来可持续。
while yet 表示“与此同时还要”，引导伴随状语从句。
when 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 the future，补充说明未来的具体情形。

sentences.sentence: Increasing overall production of food, though a vast challenge in itself, will not be enough, however.
sentences.translation: 然而，提高粮食的整体产量——尽管这本身就是一项巨大的挑战——也还远远不够。

structure.text: though a vast challenge in itself

difficult_points: Increasing overall production of food 是动名词短语作主语。
though a vast challenge in itself 是插入的让步状语，省略了主谓，完整为 though it is a vast challenge in itself。
however 位于句末，起转折连接作用，相当于 but。

sentences.sentence: At the same time storage and distribution systems must allow everyone access to at least a moderate share of the total.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，储存和分配体系必须确保每个人都能获得总量中至少适度的一份。

structure.text: must allow everyone access to at least a moderate share of the total

difficult_points: At the same time 承接上一句，表示与提高产量同时进行的另一项要求。
allow sb access to sth 表示“让某人获得……的机会/份额”。
